texto: I enjoy what Twitter is because I can really connect with the fans and it's a great way to share information with them and it's also a great way to entertain. I like being able to put a smile on people's faces and letting them know what I'm doing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Peter Facinelli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a felicidade. O trecho “I enjoy what Twitter is because I can really connect with the fans and it's a great way to share …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, great, enjoy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de enjoy e people.
